name: plugin-i32-binary-family-descriptor-consumption
title: Plugin i32 binary family descriptor consumption
description: Migrate RVV and scalar plugin-local i32 add/sub proposal/materialization consumers to use the bounded C++ i32 binary family descriptor registry for shared family facts while preserving plugin-owned semantics.
creator: codex
notes: Completed module behavior: RVV and scalar plugin i32 add/sub consumers now use registry-backed family facts for frontend lowering lookup, descriptor identity, microkernel op identity, emission kind, route id, runtime ABI id/kind/name, and runtime glue role. Plugin-local supported text, diagnostics, legality, RVV policy/capability/capacity decisions, scalar fallback role, materialization decisions, and smoke/metadata-only wording stayed local. Focused and full local checks passed; no ssh rvv runtime evidence was needed because no new runtime correctness claim was made.
